summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience building GenAI solutions using Python, RAG pipelines, and agentic systems. Shipped a production RAG developer tool using LangChain, OpenAI, and Pinecone with a FastAPI backend and full CI/CD on GitHub Actions, and a real-time LLM interview platform with automated evaluation pipelines deployed on GCP and AWS. Experienced engaging with stakeholders to translate business requirements into working AI systems and presenting technical results clearly across cross-functional teams.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Generative AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic Systems, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, HuggingFace Transformers, Prompt Engineering, LLM Evaluation, NLP, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow
skills.infra: FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), GCP, AWS, Express.js, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
